heading: Models, specimens
label: 114 Models, specimens
text: The Director may require the applicant to furnish a model of convenient size to exhibit advantageously the several parts of his invention.When the invention relates to a composition of matter, the Director may require the applicant to furnish specimens or ingredients for the purpose of inspection or experiment.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 35, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 34, part (R.S. 4890 and 4891).The change in language in the second paragraph broadens the requirement for specimens.
